Current view: top level - tb/uvm/env - lliu_predictor.sv Coverage Total Hit
Test: LLIU UVM Line Coverage Lines: 94.3 % 53 50
Test Date: 2026-03-23 22:31:29 Functions: - 0 0 

            Line data    Source code
       1              : // lliu_predictor.sv — Reference model predictor
       2              : //
       3              : // Subscribes to AXI4-Stream monitor to observe ITCH messages.
       4              : // On each valid Add Order, calls DPI-C golden model to compute expected
       5              : // inference result. Sends expected float32 result to scoreboard.
       6              : 
       7              : // DPI-C function imports (disabled when UVM_NO_DPI is defined)
       8              : `ifndef UVM_NO_DPI
       9              : import "DPI-C" function int dpi_golden_init(string model_path);
      10              : import "DPI-C" function int dpi_golden_inference(
      11              :     input  shortint unsigned features[], input int num_features,
      12              :     input  shortint unsigned weights[],  input int num_weights,
      13              :     output real result
      14              : );
      15              : import "DPI-C" function int dpi_golden_extract_features(
      16              :     input  int unsigned price,
      17              :     input  longint unsigned order_ref,
      18              :     input  int side,
      19              :     output shortint unsigned features_out[],
      20              :     input  int num_features
      21              : );
      22              : import "DPI-C" function void dpi_golden_cleanup();
      23              : `endif
      24              : 
      25              : class lliu_predictor extends uvm_subscriber #(axi4_stream_transaction);
      26            0 :     `uvm_component_utils(lliu_predictor)
      27              : 
      28              :     // Analysis port for expected results → scoreboard
      29              :     uvm_analysis_port #(real) result_ap;
      30              : 
      31              :     // Stored weights (bfloat16 bit patterns) — set by test before stimulus
      32              :     shortint unsigned m_weights[];
      33              : 
      34              :     // Track initialization state
      35            6 :     bit m_dpi_initialized = 0;
      36              : 
      37            6 :     function new(string name = "lliu_predictor", uvm_component parent = null);
      38            6 :         super.new(name, parent);
      39              :     endfunction
      40              : 
      41            6 :     function void build_phase(uvm_phase phase);
      42            6 :         super.build_phase(phase);
      43            6 :         result_ap = new("result_ap", this);
      44              :     endfunction
      45              : 
      46              :     // Initialize DPI-C golden model
      47            6 :     function void init_golden_model();
      48              : `ifndef UVM_NO_DPI
      49              :         string model_path;
      50              : 
      51              :         if (m_dpi_initialized) return;
      52              : 
      53              :         // Get golden model path from plusarg or config_db
      54              :         if (!$value$plusargs("GOLDEN_MODEL=%s", model_path)) begin
      55              :             `uvm_warning("PREDICTOR", "No +GOLDEN_MODEL plusarg, DPI-C bridge disabled")
      56              :             return;
      57              :         end
      58              : 
      59              :         if (dpi_golden_init(model_path) != 0) begin
      60              :             `uvm_error("PREDICTOR", "Failed to initialize DPI-C golden model")
      61              :             return;
      62              :         end
      63              : 
      64              :         m_dpi_initialized = 1;
      65              :         `uvm_info("PREDICTOR", $sformatf("DPI-C golden model initialized: %s", model_path), UVM_LOW)
      66              : `else
      67            6 :         `uvm_info("PREDICTOR", "DPI-C disabled (UVM_NO_DPI), using local computation", UVM_LOW)
      68              : `endif
      69              :     endfunction
      70              : 
      71              :     // Set weights for prediction (called by test sequence before stimulus)
      72          134 :     function void set_weights(shortint unsigned weights[]);
      73          134 :         m_weights = new[weights.size()](weights);
      74          134 :         `uvm_info("PREDICTOR", $sformatf("Weights set: %0d elements", weights.size()), UVM_MEDIUM)
      75              :     endfunction
      76              : 
      77              :     // Called by analysis port when AXI4-Stream monitor captures a transaction
      78          733 :     function void write(axi4_stream_transaction t);
      79          733 :         byte unsigned msg_bytes[];
      80          733 :         int byte_count;
      81          733 :         int msg_len;
      82          733 :         byte unsigned msg_type;
      83              : 
      84              :         // Convert AXI4-Stream beats to raw byte array (big-endian)
      85          733 :         byte_count = t.tdata.size() * 8;
      86          733 :         msg_bytes = new[byte_count];
      87         3517 :         foreach (t.tdata[i]) begin
      88        28136 :             for (int b = 0; b < 8; b++)
      89        28136 :                 msg_bytes[i*8 + b] = t.tdata[i][63 - b*8 -: 8];
      90              :         end
      91              : 
      92              :         // Parse 2-byte big-endian length prefix
      93          733 :         if (byte_count < 2) return;
      94          733 :         msg_len = {msg_bytes[0], msg_bytes[1]};
      95              : 
      96              :         // Check for Add Order message type ('A' = 0x41)
      97          733 :         if (byte_count < 3) return;
      98          733 :         msg_type = msg_bytes[2];
      99          642 :         if (msg_type != 8'h41) begin
     100           91 :             `uvm_info("PREDICTOR", $sformatf("Non-Add-Order message type 0x%02h, skipping", msg_type), UVM_HIGH)
     101            0 :             return;
     102              :         end
     103              : 
     104              :         // Parse fields and compute expected result
     105          733 :         compute_expected(msg_bytes, byte_count);
     106              :     endfunction
     107              : 
     108              :     // Parse ITCH Add Order fields and compute expected inference result
     109          642 :     function void compute_expected(byte unsigned msg_bytes[], int byte_count);
     110          642 :         shortint unsigned features[4];
     111          642 :         real expected_result;
     112          642 :         int status;
     113              : 
     114              :         // Extract message body (skip 2-byte length prefix)
     115              :         // Fields per ITCH 5.0 Add Order layout:
     116              :         //   [2]      message type ('A')
     117              :         //   [13:20]  order reference (8 bytes at offset 11 from msg body start)
     118              :         //   [21]     side ('B'/'S')
     119              :         //   [34:37]  price (4 bytes)
     120              : 
     121          642 :         int unsigned price;
     122          642 :         longint unsigned order_ref;
     123          642 :         int side;
     124              : 
     125              :         // Byte offsets in msg_bytes (with 2-byte length prefix):
     126              :         // msg_body starts at index 2
     127              :         // order_ref at body offset 11 → msg_bytes[13..20]
     128              :         // side at body offset 19 → msg_bytes[21]
     129              :         // price at body offset 32 → msg_bytes[34..37]
     130              : 
     131          640 :         if (byte_count < 38) begin
     132            2 :             `uvm_warning("PREDICTOR", "Add Order message too short")
     133            0 :             return;
     134              :         end
     135              : 
     136          642 :         order_ref = 0;
     137         5120 :         for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++)
     138         5120 :             order_ref = (order_ref << 8) | msg_bytes[13 + i];
     139              : 
     140          642 :         side = (msg_bytes[21] == 8'h42) ? 1 : 0;  // 'B' = buy
     141              : 
     142          642 :         price = 0;
     143         2560 :         for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
     144         2560 :             price = (price << 8) | msg_bytes[34 + i];
     145              : 
     146              :         `uvm_info("PREDICTOR", $sformatf("Add Order: price=%0d side=%0d order_ref=%0h",
     147          642 :                   price, side, order_ref), UVM_MEDIUM)
     148              : 
     149              :         // Compute expected features via DPI-C
     150              : `ifndef UVM_NO_DPI
     151              :         if (m_dpi_initialized && m_weights.size() > 0) begin
     152              :             status = dpi_golden_extract_features(price, order_ref, side, features, 4);
     153              :             if (status != 0) begin
     154              :                 `uvm_error("PREDICTOR", "DPI-C extract_features failed")
     155              :                 return;
     156              :             end
     157              : 
     158              :             status = dpi_golden_inference(features, 4, m_weights, m_weights.size(),
     159              :                                           expected_result);
     160              :             if (status != 0) begin
     161              :                 `uvm_error("PREDICTOR", "DPI-C inference failed")
     162              :                 return;
     163              :             end
     164              : 
     165              :             `uvm_info("PREDICTOR", $sformatf("Expected result: %f", expected_result), UVM_MEDIUM)
     166              :             result_ap.write(expected_result);
     167              :         end else begin
     168              :             `uvm_info("PREDICTOR", "DPI-C not available, computing locally", UVM_MEDIUM)
     169              :             compute_local(price, order_ref, side);
     170              :         end
     171              : `else
     172          642 :         compute_local(price, order_ref, side);
     173              : `endif
     174              :     endfunction
     175              : 
     176              :     // Local computation fallback (when DPI-C is not available)
     177              :     // Uses the same bfloat16 math as the golden model
     178          640 :     function void compute_local(int unsigned price, longint unsigned order_ref, int side);
     179          640 :         real expected_result;
     180              :         // Placeholder: scoreboard comparison skipped when DPI-C unavailable
     181          640 :         `uvm_info("PREDICTOR", "Local computation not implemented (use DPI-C for accuracy)", UVM_LOW)
     182              :     endfunction
     183              : 
     184            6 :     function void final_phase(uvm_phase phase);
     185              : `ifndef UVM_NO_DPI
     186              :         if (m_dpi_initialized)
     187              :             dpi_golden_cleanup();
     188              : `endif
     189              :     endfunction
     190              : endclass
